title: Metal Dog Chain Leash - Chew Proof 4FT/1.2M Heavy Duty Anti-Bite Lead With Nylon Soft Padded Handle for Small Medium Large Dogs (3MM)
features: 【Size】120cm / 47.24inch length, 3MM thick, this dog chain lead fits medium and large size dog.
【Metal Material】Made of high-quality iron chain material, no rust, multi-layer plating process for maximum strength and durability.
【Strong Snap Clip】Comes with heavy duty swivel clip hook, strong tensile resistance, flexible to link any dog collars or harness.
【Comfortable Handle】Soft & durable nylon padded handle, comfortable to hold, protecting your hands from rope burn even your dog pulls.
【Application】Metal leash made for medium to large dogs, keep your furry friend under your control, keep your pet secure when outdoor walking/training /traveling.
description: Chew proof chain leash, Seamless Welding chain will not damage the dog's hair, suitable for dogs of any breed for daily walking. Specifications: Colors: Black Material: Metal Length: 120cm(4ft) Width: 0.2cm Suggestion: Small to Medium Dogs Features: 1. Constructed with high density welded iron for maximum strength, plus a unique multi-layer plating process. 2. 360 degree swivel sturdy clasp gives your dog premium freedom. No winding free walking for your dogs anymore. 3. Chain lead with comfortable high density leather handle padded with Thick Foam Makes You Comfortable and no rope burn feeling. protecting your hands from rope burn, use conveniently. Package included: 1* Dog chain leads
